welcome.title: Welcome to JuBu AI
welcome.description: AI-powered storyboard creation tool for anime and short dramas. Transform your ideas into visual content quickly.

step1.title: Import or Create Script
step1.description: Upload a script file or use AI to generate one. The system will automatically parse the script structure.

step2.title: Generate Characters & Scenes
step2.description: Use AI to extract character information and generate character designs and scene backgrounds.

step3.title: Create Storyboards
step3.description: Select script segments and generate storyboard images with one click.

step4.title: Export Final Content
step4.description: Export storyboards as video or images for post-production.

character.title: Character Library
character.noCharacters: No characters yet. Extract or add characters first.

scene.title: Scene Library
scene.noScenes: No scenes yet. Extract or add scenes first.

director.title: AI Director
director.noShots: No shots yet. Generate storyboards first.
